membership_no.text: เลขทะเบียน

root.sql:
select sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no ,sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_fullname ,sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no ,FP_GET_GROUP_CONTROL(sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no) as GROUP_CONTROL ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( trim(FP_GET_GROUP_CONTROL(sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no)) ) as group_name , CASE WHEN sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' THEN 'ค่าหุ้น' WHEN sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' THEN 'เงินกู้' WHEN sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' THEN 'เงินฝาก' ELSE sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group
END AS data_group_name
, CASE WHEN sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' THEN pka_com_function.fp_form_conno(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno) WHEN sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' THEN pka_com_function.fp_form_depno(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno) ELSE sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group END AS data_refno_format
,(SELECT sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name FROM sc_dep_m_rule WHERE sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type AND ROWNUM = 1) AS deposit_name
,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno ,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type ,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance from sc_cls_confirm_data ,sc_cls_confirm_mem where sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group not in 'ISU' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = '067327' -- and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no BETWEEN '!member_group_no_1!' AND '!member_group_no_2!' -- and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '!confirm_date_1!'
group by sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no ,sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_fullname ,sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no ,FP_GET_GROUP_CONTROL(sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no) ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( trim(FP_GET_GROUP_CONTROL(sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no)) ) ,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group ,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno ,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type ,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance ORDER BY sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no ,sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no ,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group desc ,sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type
